name: scuba-counter
description: Camera-based SCUBA counter with Firebase leaderboard and server-side score verification.

scripts.build: npm --workspace web run build && npm --workspace functions run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace web run lint && npm --workspace functions run lint
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm --workspace web run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:functions: npm --workspace functions run build && firebase deploy --only functions
